summary: Iteration 9 testing completed - Phase 3 (Autonomous Orchestrator) and Phase 4 (Living Knowledge Base) fully functional. All 68 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend History tab working correctly after bug fix. Fixed React rendering error when loading previous sessions.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 3 Integration: Plan execution now loads self-improvement rules, applies email optimization to outreach steps, injects knowledge context, and stores learnings to knowledge base
Phase 4 Knowledge Base: Auto-ingest endpoint extracts key information using AI, search endpoint uses regex matching, RAG query endpoint provides answers with sources
Conversation History: Full CRUD operations working - list sessions with formatted preview, get messages, delete session, create new session
Bug Fixed: React rendering error when loading previous sessions - parsed.message could be object instead of string

success_rate.frontend: 100% (History tab, load session, delete session, new session all working)

seed_data_creation: Test knowledge documents created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 and Phase 4 fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/ai/knowledge/auto-ingest (extracts key info from content), GET /api/ai/knowledge/search (regex search), POST /api/ai/knowledge/query-rag (RAG with sources). Conversation History: GET /api/ai/sessions/list (formatted list with title, preview, messageCount), GET /api/ai/session/{id}/messages, DELETE /api/ai/session/{id}, POST /api/ai/session/new. Frontend History tab in sidebar shows conversation list, can load previous sessions, delete sessions, and create new sessions.

backend_phase3_integration: Quick action with outreach agent - PASS
Quick action with knowledge agent - PASS
Agent learnings stored after execution - PASS
frontend: AI Command Center loads at /ai - PASS
History tab shows conversation list - PASS

phase3_autonomous_orchestrator.details: Plan execution integrates self-learning rules, applies email optimization, injects knowledge context, stores learnings

phase4_knowledge_base.details: Auto-ingest extracts key info, search uses regex, RAG query returns answers with sources

conversation_history.details: Full CRUD - list with formatted preview, get messages, delete, create new

frontend_history_tab.details: Shows conversation list, can load/delete/create sessions

bug_fixed.issue: React error 'Objects are not valid as a React child' when loading previous sessions
bug_fixed.cause: parsed.message, clarifyingQuestions, and suggestedActions could be objects instead of strings
bug_fixed.fix: Added type checking: typeof x === 'string' ? x : (x?.text || JSON.stringify(x))

mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
mocked_apis.data_sources: Apollo.io, Clearbit, Crunchbase integrations are UI placeholders only
